title: BetterMiner
description: Toggle-able vein-miner that harvests entire ore veins or tree trunks — stays balanced by scaling your mining time with the vein size.
body:
# BetterMiner

**One key. Every ore. No exploit.**

BetterMiner adds a toggle-able vein-mining mode that lets you harvest entire ore veins or tree trunks in one go — while keeping the game balanced by scaling your mining time with the number of blocks you break.

---

## Features

- **Vein Mining** — Press `V` (rebindable) to toggle vein-mine mode. Break any ore or log and all connected blocks of the same type follow, in a satisfying cascade wave.
- **Balanced by Design** — Mining a 64-block vein takes 64× longer than a single block. No instamine exploits, no server lag spike.
- **Configurable Limits** — Set a max block cap (1–4096) so you control how far the vein can spread.
- **Resource Costs** — Optionally consume tool durability and/or hunger proportional to blocks broken.
- **Ore & Log Support** — Works on all ore tags and all log tags. Enable or disable each independently.
- **Diagonal Connections** — Optional diagonal neighbour detection for naturally-grown trees.
- **Server-Authoritative** — All settings live server-side. OPs configure via `/bmconfig`; values sync automatically to every client.
- **In-Game Config Screen** — Full YACL-powered GUI (requires [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)).
- **Multilingual** — English & Turkish included out of the box.

---

## Usage

| Action | Default |
|--------|---------|
| Toggle vein-mine mode | `V` |
| Check status | `/betterminer status` |
| Open config screen | `/betterminer config` |
| Server config (OP) | `/bmconfig <setting> <value>` |

---

## Configuration

| Setting | Default | Description |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| Max blocks per vein | 256 | Hard cap (1–4096) |
| Affect ores | ✅ | Mine connected ores |
| Affect logs | ✅ | Mine connected logs |
| Diagonal connections | ✅ | Needed for natural trees |
| Consume durability | ✅ | Tools wear proportionally |
| Consume hunger | ✅ | Small exhaustion per extra block |
| Server timing tolerance | 0.05 | Latency compensation (0.0–0.5) |

---

## Requirements

- **Minecraft** 26.1.2
- **Fabric Loader** ≥ 0.19.2
- **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** (required)
- **[YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)** (required)
- **[ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)** (optional — adds config button to mod list)
- **Java** 25+

---

## Compatibility

Works in **singleplayer and multiplayer**. The mod runs on both client and server (`*` environment). Installing only on the server is not supported — both sides need the mod.
